channel.title: 战况追踪 — Global Conflict Monitor
channel.description: 实时追踪全球主要冲突态势，多源聚合情报

item.title: [巴以冲突] ISRAEL → ISRAEL : Physically assault, not specified below (Israel)
item.description: GDELT Event: Physically assault, not specified below. Actors: ISRAEL / ISRAEL. Location: Israel. Goldstein Scale: -9.5. Mentioned in 4 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] ISRAEL → AUSTRALIAN : Arrest, detain, or charge with legal action (Sydney, New South Wales, Australia)
item.description: GDELT Event: Arrest, detain, or charge with legal action. Actors: ISRAEL / AUSTRALIAN. Location: Sydney, New South Wales, Australia. Goldstein Scale: -5.0. Mentioned in 10 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] TURKEY → AUSSIE : Arrest, detain, or charge with legal action (Gaza, Israel (general), Israel)
item.description: GDELT Event: Arrest, detain, or charge with legal action. Actors: TURKEY / AUSSIE. Location: Gaza, Israel (general), Israel. Goldstein Scale: -5.0. Mentioned in 8 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] PALESTINIAN → ISRAELI : Engage in popular protest, not specified below (Israel)
item.description: GDELT Event: Engage in popular protest, not specified below. Actors: PALESTINIAN / ISRAELI. Location: Israel. Goldstein Scale: -6.5. Mentioned in 4 sources.

item.title: [也门/胡塞武装] WARSHIP → nan : Fight with artillery and tanks (Yemen)
item.description: GDELT Event: Fight with artillery and tanks. Actors: WARSHIP / nan. Location: Yemen. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 10 sources.

item.title: [叙利亚局势] SYRIA → CORRESPONDENT : Arrest, detain, or charge with legal action (Damascus, Dimashq, Syria)
item.description: GDELT Event: Arrest, detain, or charge with legal action. Actors: SYRIA / CORRESPONDENT. Location: Damascus, Dimashq, Syria. Goldstein Scale: -5.0. Mentioned in 10 sources.

item.title: [台海局势] THE US → TAIWAN : Fight with artillery and tanks (Beijing, Beijing, China)
item.description: GDELT Event: Fight with artillery and tanks. Actors: THE US / TAIWAN. Location: Beijing, Beijing, China. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 4 sources.

item.title: [俄乌战争] DEFENCE SECRETARY → RUSSIAN : Fight with artillery and tanks (Russia)
item.description: GDELT Event: Fight with artillery and tanks. Actors: DEFENCE SECRETARY / RUSSIAN. Location: Russia. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 6 sources.

item.title: [俄乌战争] MILITARY → ISLAM : Arrest, detain, or charge with legal action (Maykop, Adygeya, Russia)
item.description: GDELT Event: Arrest, detain, or charge with legal action. Actors: MILITARY / ISLAM. Location: Maykop, Adygeya, Russia. Goldstein Scale: -5.0. Mentioned in 8 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] PALESTINIAN → DISPLACED PERSON : Use conventional military force, not specified below (Gaza, Israel (general), Israel)
item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: PALESTINIAN / DISPLACED PERSON. Location: Gaza, Israel (general), Israel. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 3 sources.

item.title: [巴以冲突] ISRAELI → nan : Fight with small arms and light weapons (Gaza Strip)
item.description: GDELT Event: Fight with small arms and light weapons. Actors: ISRAELI / nan. Location: Gaza Strip. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 2 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Use conventional military force, not specified below. Actors: ISRAEL / IRAN. Location: Barakah, Dahuk, Iraq. Goldstein Scale: -10.0. Mentioned in 1 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Arrest, detain, or charge with legal action. Actors: ISRAEL / ACTIVIST. Location: New Zealand. Goldstein Scale: -5.0. Mentioned in 4 sources.

item.description: GDELT Event: Demonstrate or rally. Actors: PROTESTER / SETTLER. Location: Israel. Goldstein Scale: -6.5. Mentioned in 2 sources.
